extra.reason: Completed initial Go CLI scaffold with strict workflow validation, parallel DAG execution, human gate pause events, command runner safeguards, worktree isolation helper, JSONL run logs, tests, and sample workflow.

Completed default workflow compatibility parsing, OpenCode runner support, command-template resolution, trigger/condition semantics, and live free-model OpenCode smoke across all local default workflow files.
Implemented dependency-free watch dashboard with JSONL parsing, CLI snapshot/refresh mode, unit tests, integration smoke, and live OpenCode smoke.
Provider presets implemented with unit coverage and live OpenCode smoke passing; global build is currently blocked by concurrent missing runWithRoutes route work.
Implemented persisted human gate approval and resume flow with unit, fake OpenCode, and live OpenCode smoke coverage.
Implemented Go pre-commit quality gate with banned attribution scanning, coverage threshold enforcement, hook install docs, unit tests, and temp-git smoke test.
Implemented bounded failure routes with retry and repeated-failure safeguards, plus unit and live OpenCode coverage.
Added sanitized complex workflow fixtures plus reusable JSONL/live OpenCode harness with unit and opt-in real CLI coverage.
Added sanitized complex workflow fixtures plus reusable JSONL/live OpenCode harness with unit and opt-in real CLI coverage.
Vendored sanitized default workflows and command templates into assets/defaults, updated tests and live OpenCode smoke to use bundled assets, and documented self-contained defaults.
Updated AGENTS.md to require commits after completed features/tasks and validated the self-contained default asset work before commit.
Verified completed git worktree branches are already ancestors of main; no merge commit was needed. Quality gates pass with aggregate coverage above target.
